name: Indian Rupee
description: The Indian Rupee is the currency of the world's most populous country and fifth-largest economy. India is a major player in IT services and pharmaceuticals.
historicalNotes: The rupee has ancient origins, with the name derived from the Sanskrit 'rūpya' (silver coin). Modern decimalization occurred in 1957. The ₹ symbol was adopted in 2010. India's 2016 demonetization of ₹500 and ₹1000 notes was one of the largest monetary experiments in history.
